zh.lifeSummary: 當Haer Verch Cyllyn於大約1025年出生在威爾士凱爾納方史爾時，她的父親Cyllyn Ap Blaidd33歲，母親Hynydd verch Rhys26歲。她於大約1046年與Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys在威爾士結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1089年在她的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Haer Verch Cyllyn于大约1025年出生在威尔士凱爾納方史爾时，她的父亲Cyllyn Ap Blaidd33岁，母亲Hynydd verch Rhys26岁。她于大约1046年与Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys在威尔士结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1089年在她的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Haer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Georg, Otto.
North German and Dutch: variant of   Haar   1.
German (Här): variant of Hähr, from Middle High German heher ‘jay (the bird)’.

variants.name: Haar
meanings: Ancient name of uncertain origin. Hājar was the Egyptian concubine of   Ibrāhīm   (Abraham), mother of Ismā‘īl (Ishmael), from whom Arabs believe they are descended.

en.lifeSummary: When Haer Verch Cyllyn was born about 1025, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, her father, Cyllyn Ap Blaidd, was 33 and her mother, Hynydd verch Rhys, was 26. She married Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys about 1046, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1089, in her hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Haer Verch Cyllyn est née environ 1025, à Caernarfonshire, Galles, son père, Cyllyn Ap Blaidd, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Hynydd verch Rhys, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys environ 1046, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1089, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Haer Verch Cyllyn um 1025 in Caernarfonshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Cyllyn Ap Blaidd 33 und ihre Mutter Hynydd verch Rhys 26. Sie hat um 1046 in Wales Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1089 im Alter von 65 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Haer Verch Cyllyn è nata il circa 1025 nel Caernarfonshire, Galles, sua padre, Cyllyn Ap Blaidd, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Hynydd verch Rhys, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys circa 1046, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1089, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Haer Verch Cyllynが約1025年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Cyllyn Ap Blaiddは33歳，母Hynydd verch Rhysは26歳であった。約1046年にウェールズでBleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1089年に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Haer Verch Cyllyn(이)가 대략 1025년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cyllyn Ap Blaidd(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hynydd verch Rhys(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1046년 웨일스에서 Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1089년 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Haer Verch Cyllyn nasceu aproximadamente 1025, em Caernarfonshire, Gales, seu pai, Cyllyn Ap Blaidd, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Hynydd verch Rhys, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys aproximadamente 1046, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1089, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Haer Verch Cyllyn родилась около 1025 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Cyllyn Ap Blaidd было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Hynydd verch Rhys, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys около 1046 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1089 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Haer Verch Cyllyn nació aproximadamente 1025, en Caernarfonshire, Gales, su papá, Cyllyn Ap Blaidd, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Hynydd verch Rhys, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Bleddyn "Sais" Ap Cynfyn King of Gwynedd and Powys aproximadamente 1046, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1089, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
